title: Asian Weapons of Destruction
description: Based off of the legendary weapons asian parents use.
body:
This is just for fun, but there are no crafting recipes for the weapons _**yet...**_


<details>
<summary>Weapons</summary>


<details>
<summary>#1</summary>

The Slipper
"The Classic"
- DMG: 50
- Speed: 2
- Crafting Recipe: (None yet)
- Special Ability (Right Click): Right Click to summon lightning at each entity (excluding you) in a 10 block radius. (No Cooldown)
- Special Ability #2 (Passive): Any entity hit has a 1% chance of despawning.

</details>




<details>
<summary>#2</summary>

The Power Cord
"When range is needed, use me!"
- DMG: 25
- Speed: 1
- Crafting Recipe: (None yet)
- Special Ability (Passive) : Range is increaced to an extra 5 blocks. (Implemented later)

</details>



</details>
